CREATE TABLE test_arrays (arr1 Array(Int32), arr2 Array(Int32), arr3 Array(Int32));
SELECT arrayIntersect(arr1, arr2, arr3) AS no_intersect FROM test_arrays;
SELECT arrayIntersect([1, 2], arr1) AS array_in_arr1 FROM test_arrays;
SELECT arrayIntersect(arrayMap(x -> x + 1, arr1), arrayMap(x -> x * 2, arr2)) AS transformed_intersect FROM test_arrays;
SELECT arrayIntersect(arr1, (SELECT arr2 FROM test_arrays WHERE arr1 = [1, 2]), arr3) AS nested_intersect FROM test_arrays;
SELECT t1.arr1, arrayIntersect(t1.arr1, t2.arr2) AS common_elements FROM test_arrays AS t1 JOIN test_arrays AS t2 ON arrayLength(arrayIntersect(t1.arr1, t2.arr2)) > 0;
SELECT arrayIntersect(arr1, (SELECT arr1 FROM other_arrays)) AS cross_table_intersect FROM test_arrays;
